scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:chat" "npm run dev:payment" "npm run dev:gateway"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd services/auth-service && npm install && cd ../chat-service && npm install && cd ../payment-service && npm install && cd ../../gateway && npm install
scripts.build:all: cd services/auth-service && npm run build && cd ../chat-service && npm run build && cd ../payment-service && npm run build && cd ../../gateway && npm run build
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules && cd services/auth-service && rm -rf node_modules && cd ../chat-service && rm -rf node_modules && cd ../payment-service && rm -rf node_modules && cd ../../gateway && rm -rf node_modules
